text: I recently tried to change my password, but now I can't log in at all. It keeps saying my account doesn't exist, even though I can see it in my email records. This doesn't make any sense!
I am unable to access my account, it keeps saying my password is incorrect even though I am sure I am typing it correctly. Can you assist me with this issue?

I tried to log in, but it says my password is wrong. Though, I swear I just changed it a few days ago. Just so strange because I didn’t think I had any issues at all. Is it possible there's some mix-up with my account? Maybe I should change it again, but then what if it happens again? Anyway, help would be great.
I received the wrong color. Can I just get my money back? I don't want to deal with exchanges.

Hey there, I tried changing my email because my old one was getting too much spam, but now I'm locked out of my account! I can't seem to get the verification codes sent to my new email, which is just super frustrating. I mean, I thought everything would work smoothly, but I'm not sure what to do next. Any help would be great!

I'm really frustrated right now because I thought I was getting something that worked, but it’s not functioning as advertised. I mean, I even checked the site and it looks like it should be doing a lot more than it actually is! So I'm left wondering if I just wasted my money or if there’s something wrong on your end. It’s very disappointing, to say the least!

I've been trying to connect my device to your app for ages and it just won't recognize it. I even reset my router and fiddled with the settings, but all it says is 'Connection Failed.' It's like my Wi-Fi is playing hide and seek with the app! Also, I noticed my neighbor has the same model and he connected in minutes, so I guess it's just me who's having this trouble. Is there any way to troubleshoot this? Maybe some secret steps that aren’t in the usual guide?
i dont kno why but my screen goes black sometimes. like, its not the power cause it stays on but, the apps freeze? also, no error msg or anything. weird right??

So, my new email is, um, it's a little odd, and now all those codes for password resets, they're not coming through. Also, I bought a fancy coffee maker last week, but I don't think that matters much for this, right?
Hey! I'm really curious if you guys have any discounts for students? I kinda need it and I hope I can find out how to get it soon!

Hey there, I was just thinking about how many times I've used your service to book travel, and I have this curious question regarding the API documentation. Given that it mentions various endpoints and features, could you clarify if there’s any specific limitation on the number of requests that can be made to the search endpoint? Also, while I have you, I've also been considering the impact of those rate limits on my overall functionality and just how often they might be enforced, especially during high traffic periods. That being said, I'm not entirely sure if this is all too relevant, but it could impact how I structure my usage going forward.
Is there a way to get a refund if I didn't get my order but I also changed my mind?

I've reached out several times regarding the poor service I've been receiving lately. This is not the first time I've had issues and frankly, it's getting quite frustrating. I would appreciate it if someone could look into this matter and provide a resolution, as I expect better from a company like yours.

I've been trying to log into my account all day, but every time I enter my credentials, I just get this error message. It's super frustrating because I need to access my orders for an upcoming trip and the page keeps loading incorrectly. I wish I could just reset my password, but it seems like I didn’t get the reset email. Can you look into this, please? I feel like I'm stuck here not knowing what to do next.
hey, quick ? does ur app support multiple log ins or only 1 at a time? thx.

I have recently xperienced an issue with a product I purchased. It's not functioning as advertised and I would like to return it for a refund. Can you please provide me with the necessary steps to initiate this process? I feel really disappointed with this experience.
